zh.Stockport, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾斯托普特
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Warren III於1414年出生在英國英格蘭爾波易頓時，他的父親Lawrence de Warrene20歲，母親Lady Margery de Bulkeley26歲。他和Isabel Stanley至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1475年享年61歲。

zh-hans.Stockport, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾斯托普特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Warren III于1414年出生在英国英格兰爾波易頓时，他的父亲Lawrence de Warrene20岁，母亲Lady Margery de Bulkeley26岁。他和Isabel Stanley至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1475年享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Warren
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Warin, Werin, a borrowing of ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. Compare Waring .

English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from La Varrenne in Seine-Maritime, France, named with a Gaulish element probably descriptive of alluvial land or sandy soil. This was the name of a major Norman family after the Conquest. In Ireland, this name has been Gaelicized as Bharain.
Irish: adopted as an English form of Gaelic Ó Murnáin (see Murnane , Warner ).

variants.name: Warrens
meanings: English: variant of Warren with genitival or excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Warrener
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French warrennier ‘warrener’, an officer employed to watch over game in a park or game preserve. Compare Warren .

variants.name: Murnane
meanings: Irish (Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Murnáin, a shortened and dissimilated form of Ó Manannáin ‘descendant of Manannán’, name borne in Celtic mythology by a sea god associated with the Isle of Man. All three syllables appear in the variant Marrinan. This name has also been Anglicized as Warren and Warner .

variants.name: Warne
meanings: occasionally a habitational name from Wearne in Somerset. The place takes its name from a lost stream-name based on British verno- ‘alder, swamp’.

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Warren III was born in 1414, in Poynton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Lawrence de Warrene, was 20 and his mother, Lady Margery de Bulkeley, was 26. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Isabel Stanley. He died in 1475, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Warren III est né en 1414, à Poynton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lawrence de Warrene, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lady Margery de Bulkeley, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Isabel Stanley. Il est décédé en 1475, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Warren III 1414 in Poynton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lawrence de Warrene 20 und seine Mutter Lady Margery de Bulkeley 26. Er hatte mit Isabel Stanley mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1475 im Alter von 61 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Warren III è nato il nel 1414 nel Poynton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Lawrence de Warrene, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margery de Bulkeley, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Isabel Stanley. Morì nel 1475, all'età di 61 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: John Warren III(이)가 1414년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 포이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lawrence de Warrene(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margery de Bulkeley(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Isabel Stanley(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1475년 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Warren III родился в 1414 г. в местности поинтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lawrence de Warrene было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margery de Bulkeley, 26.
